title: Section 18
content: 1[18. The Pro-Chancellor. --2[(1) The Pro-Chancellor shall be elected by the Court in such manner and for such term as may be prescribed by the Statutes.] (2)The Pro-Chancellor shall, in the absence of the Chancellor, preside over the convocations of the University held for conferring degrees.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 34 of 1972, s. 14, for section 18 (w.e.f. 17-6-1972). 2. Subs by Act 62 of 1981, s. 8, for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 10-2-1982).
